summary: Completed testing of Sub-recipe Recipe Protection feature (P0 bug fix). All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed correct behavior - Recetas tab correctly filters out sub-recipe recipes, Producción tab correctly displays sub-recipe management UI.
seed_data_creation: Test recipes created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sub-recipe protection feature fully implemented and tested. Key findings: 1) DELETE /api/recipes/{id} returns 400 for sub-recipes without force=true, 2) DELETE /api/recipes/{id}?force=true allows deletion, 3) Regular recipe CRUD works normally, 4) Recetas tab filters out is_subrecipe=true recipes, 5) Producción tab shows sub-recipe management with Producir/Receta buttons

backend.test_get_recipes_returns_all_including_s: PASS - Returns all recipes including sub-recipes (limit 500)
backend.test_delete_subrecipe_blocked_without_fo: PASS - Returns 400 for sub-recipe deletion without force=true
backend.test_delete_subrecipe_allowed_with_force: PASS - Allows deletion with force=true parameter
backend.test_delete_regular_recipe_works_normall: PASS - Regular recipes can be deleted without force
backend.test_create_recipe_does_not_overwrite_su: PASS - Create with empty product_id doesn't overwrite sub-recipes
backend.test_delete_by_product_blocked_for_subre: PASS - Sub-recipes protected from delete by product endpoint
backend.test_regular_recipe_crud_flow: PASS - Full CRUD operations work for regular recipes
backend.test_subrecipe_exists_in_ingredients: PASS - Sub-recipe ingredients exist in database
backend.test_subrecipe_recipe_linked_to_ingredie: PASS - Sub-recipe recipes correctly linked to ingredients
backend.test_check_production_preserves_recipe: PASS - Check-production doesn't delete recipe definitions

frontend.recetas_tab_filtering: PASS - Shows only 3 product recipes (TEST, PRESIDENTE, MINI HAMBURGUESAS), sub-recipe SALSA CHIMI CHURRI NOT shown as recipe card
frontend.recetas_tab_subrecipe_as_ingredient: PASS - SALSA CHIMI CHURRI appears as ingredient in MINI HAMBURGUESAS recipe (5 oz)
frontend.produccion_tab_subrecipe_display: PASS - Shows SALSA CHIMI CHURRI with Producir/Receta buttons and stock level
frontend.produccion_tab_stock_adecuado: PASS - Shows 'STOCK ADECUADO (1)' section with sub-recipe

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Sub-recipe recipe definitions were being spontaneously deleted from the database
bug_fix_verification.fix_implemented: Multiple layers of protection: 1) Backend DELETE blocks sub-recipes without force=true, 2) Frontend RecipesTab filters out sub-recipes, 3) create_recipe safety filter prevents matching sub-recipes, 4) delete_by_product blocks sub-recipe deletion
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: PASS - All protection layers working correctly
